name: Apfelquarkkuchen (Apple and Cream Kuchen)
recipeInstructions:
- Mix yeast, salt, 3/4 cup sugar, and 1 cup flour. Add butter to milk until very warm (120-130°F). Gradually add milk mixture to the flour mixture. Beat for 2 minutes. Add egg and remaining 1 cup flour. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed for 2 minutes.
- Mix in enough flour to form a soft dough. Knead for 5 to 10 minutes until shiny and elastic. Place in greased bowl and let rise for 1 hour or until doubled in bulk.
- Pat dough into well-greased 10-inch springform pan, pressing the dough 1 1/2 inches up the sides of the pan.
- Toss apples with lemon juice, cinnamon, 1/4 cup sugar, and 3 tablespoons flour. Arrange in rows on top of the dough.
- Beat together cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and egg. Spread over apples.
- Let rise in warm place for 1 hour before baking at 350°F for 30 minutes. Best when served warm.
